details.description: Apixaban causes bleeding, as can Acalabrutinib ; concurrent use might increase the risk of developing this effect. Manufacturer advises use with caution or avoid.
Apixaban causes bleeding, as can Aceclofenac ; concurrent use might increase the risk of developing this effect. Manufacturer advises use with caution or avoid.
Both Apixaban and Acenocoumarol can increase the risk of bleeding.
